body.title: CLOSED: Mock _post_to_channel in pe_chain unit tests
body.result: patched _post_to_channel in 8 tests across 2 files; channel spam on test runs eliminated
body.description:
pe_chain unit tests for description gate and empty-close guard were calling error paths without mocking _post_to_channel, causing real channel messages on every test run. Fixed by adding _post_to_channel patches to 8 affected tests in test_pe_chain_description_gate.py and test_pe_chain_empty_close_guard.py.

**Affected files:** tests/test_pe_chain_description_gate.py, tests/test_pe_chain_empty_close_guard.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** test files only, no production code changes
**Test plan:** 11 tests in both files pass; 3235 total test suite passes
